description: This Java class implements multi-factor authentication (MFA) challenge issuance and verification within a Spring Boot application. It manages creation of OTP challenges, delivery via email (with a stub for SMS), and validation of OTPs. The class also handles logging and fallback behaviors for OTP delivery failures.

classes.name: MfaService
classes.description: Service responsible for issuing and verifying MFA OTP challenges, handling delivery mechanisms, and maintaining challenge state.

methods.name: createChallenge
methods.description: Generates an OTP, hashes it, stores it as a challenge, and attempts to send it via email.

methods.name: verifyLatestChallenge
methods.description: Verifies if a provided OTP matches the latest unconsumed challenge for a user and marks the challenge as consumed if valid.
